ham.subject: Your recent transaction at ABC Bank
ham.body:
Dear Customer,

We would like to inform you about a recent transaction of INR 5,200 that was debited from your savings account on 09/04/2024.

If you did not authorize this transaction, please contact our 24/7 support immediately.

Thank you for banking with us.

Best Regards,
ABC Bank Customer Support

spam.subject: Income Tax Department: Refund Pending – Verify Your Details Now
spam.body:
Dear Sir/Madam,

Kripya dhyaan dein! Aapka income tax refund of INR 1,50,000 for FY 2023-24 ab process ho chuka hai. Refund ko release karne ke liye aapko apni bank details verify karni hogi aur required documents submit karne honge within 48 hours.

Click on the link below to complete the verification:
<URL>

Agar aap samay par verification nahi karte, to aapka refund delay ho sakta hai ya cancel ho sakta hai.

Thank you,
Income Tax Department
